_comment: Pre-generated golden responses for the /p/resume-screener demo sample inputs. If the user submits the exact sample (canonical hash below matches), main.py returns this blob in <500ms. Any other input falls through to a live Gemini Flash call. Regenerate with `python3 scripts/gen-demo-cache.py` after changing the sample assets or canonical_input().

ranked.reasoning: Dirk is a highly qualified candidate with 7 years of production Python experience, specifically utilizing the exact requested stack of FastAPI, PostgreSQL, and AWS. He has proven experience mentoring junior engineers and handling high-throughput data pipelines, evidenced by his work with Kafka and Debezium at N26 processing 100k events/sec. While he lacks explicit experience designing scoring models or working with LLMs, his deep expertise in distributed systems and database optimization makes him an excellent fit for the core responsibilities.
ranked.match_summary: Exceptional alignment with the core stack (Python, FastAPI, Postgres, AWS) and proven experience mentoring engineers and building high-throughput data pipelines at scale.
